heading: Civil action to enforce child support obligations; jurisdiction of district courts
label: 660 Civil action to enforce child support obligations; jurisdiction of district courts
text: The district courts of the United States shall have jurisdiction, without regard to any amount in controversy, to hear and determine any civil action certified by the Secretary of Health and Human Services under . A civil action under this section may be brought in any judicial district in which the claim arose, the plaintiff resides, or the defendant resides.section 652(a)(8) of this title
notes: Amendments1984— substituted “Health and Human Services” for “Health, Education, and Welfare”.Pub. L. 98–369
